predict.title: Report Livestock Health
predict.subtitle: Describe your animal's symptoms for diagnosis
predict.assistantSubtitle: Describe symptoms and upload a photo to get an instant health report.

chat.welcome: Namaste! I am your Pashu Assistant. Let's start by checking your animal. Please upload a clear photo of the animal.
chat.detected: Detected a healthy-looking {{animal}}! Now, let's talk about the symptoms. Select up to 4 symptoms below.
chat.confirmAnimal: I think this is a {{animal}}, but I'm not entirely sure. Is that correct?
chat.manualSelect: I couldn't detect the animal automatically. Please select the animal type manually.
chat.selectSymptoms: Got it. Now, please select the symptoms you've observed (max 4).

questions.Duration: How many days has the animal been showing these symptoms?
questions.Body_Temperature: What is the current body temperature? (if measured)
questions.Appetite_Loss: Is the animal experiencing loss of appetite?
questions.Diarrhea: Is the animal suffering from diarrhea?
questions.Labored_Breathing: Is the animal having difficulty breathing?
questions.Lameness: Is there any lameness or difficulty in walking?
questions.Skin_Lesions: Have you noticed any skin lesions or lumps?
questions.Nasal_Discharge: Is there any discharge from the nose?
questions.Eye_Discharge: Is there any discharge from the eyes?

result.title: AI Diagnosis Result
result.recommendationsPlaceholder: Please provide rest, clean water, and monitor symptoms closely. If condition worsens, contact a vet.
